## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.8

### Cameras
- Restores the camera live stream code to the previously reported working Home Assistant WebRTC path.
- Keeps standalone/device camera entity discovery, camera icons, and camera setup helpers from the newer integration work.

### Motion Events
- Preserves APK record playback metadata on camera motion events when X-Sense reports it.
- Adds data-channel payload helpers for future SD recording playback work without wiring that into the live stream path.

### Validation
- Confirms the live stream/WebRTC methods still match the earlier working camera baseline.
- Confirms the full Python test suite passes with these changes.
